rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 9/10 score and the same core praise (TypeScript/Node/React stack, AI-agent infrastructure, TDD/testing background). The wording differs and the concern list shifts (DLang focus, seniority/role-fit instead of Python/Kotlin and bandwidth), but none of these differences reference the candidate's location, nationality, or the Berlin-to-Brazil change. The variation is ordinary run-to-run rewording, not a response to the demographic signal.
